(301/JMQ)

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Jan-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: CROSS-COMPLAINANT HPM OF AMERICA, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant HPM of America's motion is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall provide code compliant objection free responses by February 7, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

Off Calendar Jan-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: CROSS-COMPLAINANT HPM OF AMERICA, LLC's Motion To Deem Admissions Admitted For Failure To Respond To Request For Admissions, Set One And For Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant HPM of America's motion is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall provide code compliant objection free responses by February 7, 2025. Counsel George Anezinos shall remit a total of $3,000 to compensate movant for these discovery motions. Payment shall be made by February 7, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

Off Calendar Jan-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: CROSS-COMPLAINANT HPM OF AMERICA, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant HPM of America's motion is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall provide code compliant objection free responses by February 7, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
